description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a weathered green paint finish, heavily mottled with patches of reddish-brown rust. The surface is rough and corroded, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements. The top of the barrel features two small, raised circular bungs, likely for filling and emptying contents. One side of the barrel displays a faded black warning symbol with a skull and crossbones inside a triangle, suggesting it once contained hazardous or toxic material. The barrel is constructed from steel, with visible horizontal reinforcement rings around its circumference. Its overall appearance suggests it is an industrial drum, commonly found in outdoor or warehouse environments.
description: A large, rusted green metal barrel with a hazardous material warning symbol and reinforced bands, showing heavy weathering and corrosion.
description_view_0: The barrel's green, rust-patched surface and two red bungs on the top are visible, with no markings apparent from this angle.
description_view_1: This view reveals the black skull-and-crossbones warning symbol on the side, along with extensive rust and the top bungs.
description_view_2: The side of the barrel is mostly green and rusted, with the edge of the warning symbol just visible, and both top bungs in view.
description_view_3: The back of the barrel shows a continuous rusted green surface with no visible markings or symbols, and both top bungs are present.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: black skull-and-crossbones warning symbol inside a triangle
